/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/E-TAKZIR.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/E-TAKZIR.dir/E-TAKZIR_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/E-TAKZIR.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/E-TAKZIR.dir/src/antarmuka_utama.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/E-TAKZIR.dir/src/baca_tulis_file.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/E-TAKZIR.dir/src/kelola_data_santri.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/E-TAKZIR.dir/src/proses_pelanggaran.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/E-TAKZIR.dir/src/jadwal_dan_aturan.cpp.o" -o E-TAKZIR  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
